arts.ttl: I scored for Liverpool in Champions League final - now I’m being left to rot in the reserves
arts.sum: Divock Origi will go down as one of Liverpool's most-loved cult heroes but has experienced a career nosedive since his exit from Anfield.

arts.ttl: AC Milan x New York Yankees Logo + Collection Released
arts.sum: AC Milan and the New York Yankees, two of the most iconic sports clubs of their sport, have teamed up to launch a special fashion collaboration.

arts.ttl: 3 changes Arne Slot needs to make after Liverpool's loss to Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: The Scotland captain, after a busy week of international football, looked a bit jaded and out of sorts against Nottingham Forest on Saturday, and was regularly unable to race back to quell quick counter-attacks. Andy Robertson has played a lot of high-leverage, high-intensity, football over the last eight years, so it some as no surprise to anyone that he's starting to look a bit leggy when racing up and down the left flank.

arts.ttl: 'Already': Alan Shearer makes claim about Elliot Anderson after watching him star against Liverpool

arts.sum: Liverpool will kick-off their Champions League quest with a clash in Italy against AC Milan in what will be a repeat of the 2005 and 2007 finals as a new TV deal begins

arts.ttl: How to watch AC Milan vs Liverpool - TV channel, live stream details, kick off time
arts.sum: Liverpool return to action when they travel to AC Milan on Tuesday as Arne Slot prepares to take charge of his first Champions League game since replacing Jurgen Klopp

arts.ttl: AC Milan vs Liverpool – Champions League Match Preview
arts.sum: San Siro is the venue and AC Milan are the opponent as Arne Slot embarks on his first Champions League outing as Liverpool manager. In what is a repeat of the Champions League finals in 2005 in Istanbul, the scene of one of football’s greatest comebacks, and 2007 in Athens, this game promises to be […] The post AC Milan vs Liverpool – Champions League Match Preview first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fan dies in Milan after he was hit by car 'while crossing a motorway at 1am' on the eve of their opening Champions League match
arts.sum: Reports from Italy claim the fan, 51, was struck by an SUV at 1am while crossing the A4 highway near the Orio al Serio airport in Bergamo.

arts.ttl: Rodri admits elite players are close to 'STRIKING' over football's congested calendar... after Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson blasted the Champions League's new format and urged that stars are 'tired of being ignored'
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: The Manchester City midfielder was bullish about players being treated as commodities, admitting that the lack of rest is worrying professionals in the game.
